title: Francophone Minority Communities Student Pilot : How to apply - Canada.ca
content:
Before you apply online, make sure you have the following:
- instruction guide to fill out your forms
- scanner or camera to create electronic copies of your documents
- valid credit or debit card to make a payment

## Get instructions to apply online
Select your country of citizenship from this list of eligible countries to get your local visa office and online application instructions:
- Central African Republic
- Democratic Republic of the Congo
- Republic of the Congo
- São Tomé and Principe

### For citizens of Democratic Republic of the Congo
Foreign nationals living in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, South Sudan and Uganda can’t travel to Canada as of May 27, 2026.
Find out more about these measures

## If you are not applying with a family member who is applying for a work permit
You must apply online. You need an account to apply online.
You can use your account to
- submit your application
- check the status of your application
When you apply, make sure you
- select “Yes, I meet an exception from submitting a provincial or territorial attestation letter” when asked, “ Do you have a provincial or territorial attestation letter or meet an exception from submitting a provincial or territorial attestation letter ”
- include all the documents you need
- submit your language test results Submit your language test results through the IRCC secure account by uploading them in the Proof of Language Test Results field.
- Submit your language test results through the IRCC secure account by uploading them in the Proof of Language Test Results field.
- follow your visa office instructions in case you need to provide other documents: Document checklist – Study permit [IMM 5826] (PDF, 140 KB)
- Document checklist – Study permit [IMM 5826] (PDF, 140 KB)
Create an account or sign in
We accept credit cards and prepaid cards from:
- UnionPay ® (for online applications only; debit cards not accepted)
If you use a prepaid credit card, keep it for at least 18 months after you pay to make refunds easier. Find more on prepaid cards .
We also accept all Visa Debit cards.The card you use doesn't have to be in your name. The cardholder’s name will appear on the receipt but it does not need to match your application.
- be from a Canadian bank using INTERAC ® Online , and
- be registered for online banking through your bank’s website.
We also accept all Debit MasterCard ® and Visa ® Debit cards. If your card has the Visa Debit logo on it, alone or with the INTERAC ® Online logo, select Visa Debit as your payment method.
The card you use does not have to be in your name. The cardholder’s name will appear on the receipt but it does not need to match your application.
